query: Give me a brief summary of the current top 3 Hacker News stories.
response:
Here are brief summaries of the current top 3 Hacker News stories:

1. "Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban" - This story discusses how certain government applications may engage in more invasive spying activities than the apps those governments prohibit. The linked article highlights concerns about privacy and surveillance in official apps. [Read more](https://www.sambent.com/the-white-house-app-has-huawei-spyware-and-an-ice-tip-line/)

2. "Do your own writing" - This article encourages individuals to write content themselves rather than relying on AI-generated text. It emphasizes the value of personal effort and authenticity in writing. [Read more](https://alexhwoods.com/dont-let-ai-write-for-you/)

3. "How to turn anything into a router" - This story demonstrates techniques for converting almost any device into a functioning router, expanding networking possibilities in creative ways. The post provides instructions and insights on this approach. [Read more](https://nbailey.ca/post/router/)

reasons.groundedness_reason:
DefaultAzureCredential failed to retrieve a token from the included credentials.
Attempted credentials:
	EnvironmentCredential: EnvironmentCredential authentication unavailable. Environment variables are not fully configured.
Visit https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/environmentcredential/troubleshoot to troubleshoot this issue.
	WorkloadIdentityCredential: WorkloadIdentityCredential authentication unavailable. The workload options are not fully configured. See the troubleshooting guide for more information: https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/workloadidentitycredential/troubleshoot. Missing required arguments: 'tenant_id', 'client_id', 'token_file_path'.
	ManagedIdentityCredential: ManagedIdentityCredential authentication unavailable, no response from the IMDS endpoint.
	SharedTokenCacheCredential: SharedTokenCacheCredential authentication unavailable. No accounts were found in the cache.
	VisualStudioCodeCredential: VisualStudioCodeCredential requires the 'azure-identity-broker' package to be installed. You must also ensure you have the Azure Resources extension installed and have signed in to Azure via Visual Studio Code.
	AzureCliCredential: Failed to invoke the Azure CLI
	AzurePowerShellCredential: Az.Account module >= 2.2.0 is not installed
	AzureDeveloperCliCredential: Azure Developer CLI could not be found. Please visit https://aka.ms/azure-dev for installation instructions and then,once installed, authenticate to your Azure account using 'azd auth login'.
	BrokerCredential: InteractiveBrowserBrokerCredential unavailable. The 'azure-identity-broker' package is required to use brokered authentication.
To mitigate this issue, please refer to the troubleshooting guidelines here at https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/defaultazurecredential/troubleshoot.

query: What are the newest stories on Hacker News right now? Show me 3.
response:
Here are the 3 newest stories on Hacker News right now:

1. "Hermes Agent v0.6.0 solves its biggest weakness against OpenClaw" by jenic_  
   Link: https://efficienist.com/hermes-agent-v0-6-0-finally-solves-its-biggest-weakness-against-openclaw/

2. "Judge halts Nexstar/Tegna merger after FCC let firms exceed TV ownership limit" by strongpigeon  
   Link: https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2026/03/judge-halts-nexstar-tegna-merger-after-fcc-let-firms-exceed-tv-ownership-limit/

3. "Delve into Compliance Theatre" by flypunk  
   Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/episodes/delve-into-compliance-theatre/

query: Which of the current best Hacker News stories are about programming?
response:
Among the current best Hacker News stories, the ones related to programming are:

1. "Copilot edited an ad into my PR" - A story about GitHub Copilot inserting an ad in a pull request. (Link: https://notes.zachmanson.com/copilot-edited-an-ad-into-my-pr/)
2. "ChatGPT won't let you type until Cloudflare reads your React state" - An exploration of a program behavior tied to React and Cloudflare. (Link: https://www.buchodi.com/chatgpt-wont-let-you-type-until-cloudflare-reads-your-react-state-i-decrypted-the-program-that-does-it/)
3. "CSS is DOOMed" - Discusses rendering challenges and developments in CSS. (Link: https://nielsleenheer.com/articles/2026/css-is-doomed-rendering-doom-in-3d-with-css/)
4. "How to turn anything into a router" - A post about creating routers in programming. (Link: https://nbailey.ca/post/router/)

These stories focus on programming topics and issues. Would you like a summary of any specific story?

DefaultAzureCredential failed to retrieve a token from the included credentials.
Attempted credentials:
	EnvironmentCredential: EnvironmentCredential authentication unavailable. Environment variables are not fully configured.
Visit https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/environmentcredential/troubleshoot to troubleshoot this issue.
	WorkloadIdentityCredential: WorkloadIdentityCredential authentication unavailable. The workload options are not fully configured. See the troubleshooting guide for more information: https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/workloadidentitycredential/troubleshoot. Missing required arguments: 'tenant_id', 'client_id', 'token_file_path'.
	ManagedIdentityCredential: ManagedIdentityCredential authentication unavailable, no response from the IMDS endpoint.
	SharedTokenCacheCredential: SharedTokenCacheCredential authentication unavailable. No accounts were found in the cache.
	VisualStudioCodeCredential: VisualStudioCodeCredential requires the 'azure-identity-broker' package to be installed. You must also ensure you have the Azure Resources extension installed and have signed in to Azure via Visual Studio Code.
	AzureCliCredential: Failed to invoke the Azure CLI
	AzurePowerShellCredential: Az.Account module >= 2.2.0 is not installed
	AzureDeveloperCliCredential: Azure Developer CLI could not be found. Please visit https://aka.ms/azure-dev for installation instructions and then,once installed, authenticate to your Azure account using 'azd auth login'.
	BrokerCredential: InteractiveBrowserBrokerCredential unavailable. The 'azure-identity-broker' package is required to use brokered authentication.
To mitigate this issue, please refer to the troubleshooting guidelines here at https://aka.ms/azsdk/python/identity/defaultazurecredential/troubleshoot.
